## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs (README / AGENTS / CHANGELOG) where relevant
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (or justified below)
- [ ] Core scan path remains offline and does not execute dependency code
